$userId..description: User profiles: name and language can be edited by owner, stats are server-write-only

name..description: User can update their own name

language..description: User can update their preferred language

timezone..description: User's timezone for scheduled notifications (e.g., America/New_York)

notificationsEnabled..description: Whether user wants to receive scheduled notifications

lastNotificationTimestamp..description: Server-tracked last notification send time to prevent duplicates

lastActive..description: User can update their last active timestamp

coins..description: Coins are server-managed, protected from client writes

wins..description: Win count visible publicly, server-managed only

xp..description: XP is server-managed, protected from manipulation

rooms..description: Game rooms with real-time board state and chat

$userId..description: Users can only add/remove themselves from queue

payments..description: Payment records are server-only, never exposed to clients

leaderboard..description: Main leaderboard is read-only for clients

tournaments..description: Tournament system with current tournament and history

current..description: Current tournament metadata is read-only. Writes via transactions only for atomicity.

playerCount..description: Player count is server-managed via ServerValue.increment()

players..description: Tournament player list with individual stats, only users can write to their own entry

$userId..description: Each user can update their own tournament stats (enforced in code via transaction pattern)

uid..description: User can only set their own uid to match path

name..description: User can update name with validation

wins..description: Tournament wins updated via server-side increment operations

losses..description: Tournament losses updated via server-side increment operations

draws..description: Tournament draws updated via server-side increment operations

joinedAt..description: User sets join time once (immutable thereafter)

leaderboard..description: Tournament leaderboard is read-only for parent level. Points calculated via transactions only, indexed for fast queries

$userId..description: Authenticated users can update their own leaderboard entry to sync points from tournament stats

history..description: Tournament history is archived and read-only

notifications..description: Telegram notification system: templates, logs, and settings

templates..description: Notification templates are read-only for clients, server-managed only

logs..description: Notification logs are server-only, never exposed to clients except through admin API
